mapper.select: SELECT * FROM self_heal_policy ORDER BY project_id
SELECT * FROM self_heal_policy WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY project_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO self_heal_policy (project_id, enabled, max_retries, retry_interval_sec, check_interval_sec, circuit_breaker, circuit_break_time, notify_email, notify_popup, auto_ai_diagnose, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{enabled}, #{maxRetries}, #{retryIntervalSec}, #{checkIntervalSec}, #{circuitBreaker}, #{circuitBreakTime}, #{notifyEmail}, #{notifyPopup}, #{autoAiDiagnose}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE self_heal_policy SET enabled = #{enabled}, max_retries = #{maxRetries}, retry_interval_sec = #{retryIntervalSec}, check_interval_sec = #{checkIntervalSec}, notify_email = #{notifyEmail}, notify_popup = #{notifyPopup}, auto_ai_diagnose = #{autoAiDiagnose}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
